602: +function parseForkGithubPayload(payload: Record<string, unknown>): ForkGithubPayload {
603: +  const target = payload.target;
604: +  if (!target || typeof target !== 'object' || Array.isArray(target)) {
605: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_request', 'Fork request requires a target object');
606: +  }
607: +
608: +  const owner = String((target as Record<string, unknown>).owner ?? '').trim();
609: +  const repo = String((target as Record<string, unknown>).repo ?? '').trim();
610: +  const branchRaw = (target as Record<string, unknown>).branch;
611: +  const branch = typeof branchRaw === 'string' ? branchRaw.trim() : undefined;
612: +  if (!owner || !repo) {
613: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_request', 'Fork request target requires owner and repo');
614: +  }
615: +
616: +  const commitInput = payload.commit;
617: +  let commitMessage: string | undefined;
618: +  if (commitInput && typeof commitInput === 'object' && !Array.isArray(commitInput)) {
619: +    const maybeMessage = (commitInput as Record<string, unknown>).message;
620: +    if (typeof maybeMessage === 'string' && maybeMessage.trim()) {
621: +      commitMessage = maybeMessage.trim();
622: +    }
623: +  }
624: +
625: +  const installationIdRaw = payload.installationId;
626: +  let installationId: number | undefined;
627: +  if (typeof installationIdRaw === 'number' && Number.isFinite(installationIdRaw)) {
628: +    installationId = Math.floor(installationIdRaw);
629: +  }
630: +
631: +  return {
632: +    target: { owner, repo, branch },
633: +    commit: commitMessage ? { message: commitMessage } : undefined,
634: +    installationId,
635: +  };
636: +}

674: +async function createGitHubAppJwt(env: Env): Promise<string> {
675: +  if (env.GITHUB_APP_JWT && env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim()) {
676: +    return env.GITHUB_APP_JWT.trim();
677: +  }
678: +
679: +  if (!env.GITHUB_APP_ID || !env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY) {
680: +    throw new OperationPreflightError(
681: +      'configuration_missing',
682: +      'GITHUB_APP_ID and GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY are required for GitHub fork operations'
683: +    );
684: +  }
685: +
686: +  const issuedAt = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000) - 30;
687: +  const payload = {
688: +    iat: issuedAt,
689: +    exp: issuedAt + 9 * 60,
690: +    iss: env.GITHUB_APP_ID,
691: +  };
692: +
693: +  const headerPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify({ alg: 'RS256', typ: 'JWT' }));
694: +  const payloadPart = base64UrlEncodeString(JSON.stringify(payload));
695: +  const signingInput = `${headerPart}.${payloadPart}`;
696: +
697: +  const pem = env.GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY.replace(/\\n/g, '\n').trim();
698: +  let signaturePart: string;
699: +  try {
700: +    const signer = createSign('RSA-SHA256');
701: +    signer.update(signingInput);
702: +    signer.end();
703: +    const signature = signer.sign(pem);
704: +    signaturePart = base64UrlEncodeBytes(new Uint8Array(signature));
705: +  } catch (error) {
706: +    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
707: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('configuration_invalid', `Invalid GitHub App private key: ${message}`);
708: +  }
709: +
710: +  return `${signingInput}.${signaturePart}`;
711: +}

713: +async function githubRequest<T>(env: Env, path: string, options: GithubRequestOptions): Promise<T> {
714: +  const baseUrl = (env.GITHUB_API_BASE_URL ?? 'https://api.github.com').replace(/\/+$/, '');
715: +  const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}${path}`, {
716: +    method: options.method ?? 'GET',
717: +    headers: {
718: +      Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
719: +      Authorization: `Bearer ${options.token}`,
720: +      'X-GitHub-Api-Version': '2022-11-28',
721: +      ...(options.body ? { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } : {}),
722: +    },
723: +    body: options.body ? JSON.stringify(options.body) : undefined,
724: +  });
725: +
726: +  if (response.status === 204) {
727: +    return undefined as T;
728: +  }
729: +
730: +  let json: unknown;
731: +  try {
732: +    json = await response.json();
733: +  } catch {
734: +    json = null;
735: +  }
736: +
737: +  if (!response.ok) {
738: +    const apiError = json as GitHubApiErrorShape | null;
739: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('github_api_error', apiError?.message || 'GitHub API request failed', {
740: +      path,
741: +      status: response.status,
742: +    });
743: +  }
744: +
745: +  return json as T;
746: +}

748: +function formatTimestamp(date: Date): string {

750: +  const mm = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
751: +  const dd = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');
752: +  const hh = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');
753: +  const min = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
754: +  const sec = String(date.getUTCSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
755: +  return `${yyyy}${mm}${dd}-${hh}${min}${sec}`;

758: +function sanitizeBranchName(input: string): string {
759: +  const normalized = input
760: +    .toLowerCase()
761: +    .replace(/[^a-z0-9/_-]/g, '-')
762: +    .replace(/-+/g, '-')
763: +    .replace(/\/+/g, '/')
764: +    .replace(/_+/g, '_')
765: +    .replace(/^[-/_.]+/, '')

768: +  const clamped = normalized.slice(0, 240);

770: +    throw new OperationPreflightError('invalid_branch', 'Computed branch name is empty after sanitization');
771: +  }
772: +

810: +async function resolveBranchForFork(
811: +  env: Env,
812: +  token: string,
813: +  owner: string,
814: +  repo: string,
815: +  requestedBranch: string | undefined,
816: +  workspaceId: string
817: +): Promise<{ branch: string; explicit: boolean }> {
818: +  const explicit = Boolean(requestedBranch && requestedBranch.trim().length > 0);
819: +  const branchBase = sanitizeBranchName(requestedBranch?.trim() || getDefaultForkBranch(workspaceId));
820: +  if (explicit) {
821: +    try {
822: +      await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(branchBase)}`, {
823: +        token,
824: +      });
825: +      throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Requested branch already exists', {
826: +        branch: branchBase,
827: +      });
828: +    } catch (error) {
829: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
830: +        const details = error.details ?? {};
831: +        if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
832: +          return { branch: branchBase, explicit: true };
833: +        }
834: +      }
835: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'branch_exists') {
836: +        throw error;
837: +      }
838: +      throw error;
839: +    }
840: +  }
841: +
842: +  let candidate = branchBase;
843: +  for (let index = 1; index <= 50; index += 1) {
844: +    try {
845: +      await githubRequest(env, `/repos/${owner}/${repo}/git/ref/heads/${encodeURIComponent(candidate)}`, {
846: +        token,
847: +      });
848: +      candidate = `${branchBase}-${index + 1}`;
849: +    } catch (error) {
850: +      if (error instanceof OperationPreflightError && error.code === 'github_api_error') {
851: +        const details = error.details ?? {};
852: +        if (typeof details === 'object' && details && (details as Record<string, unknown>).status === 404) {
853: +          return { branch: candidate, explicit: false };
854: +        }
855: +      }
856: +      throw error;
857: +    }
858: +  }
859: +
860: +  throw new OperationPreflightError('branch_exists', 'Unable to allocate non-colliding generated branch');
861: +}

863: +async function listOversizedWorkspaceFiles(
864: +  sandbox: SandboxClient,
865: +  maxBytes: number
866: +): Promise<Array<{ path: string; size: number }>> {
867: +  const output = await runSandboxCommandWithOutput(

872: +  const parsed = JSON.parse(output) as unknown;
873: +  if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {

875: +  }

877: +  return parsed

879: +      return Boolean(
880: +        item &&
881: +          typeof item === 'object' &&
882: +          typeof (item as { path?: unknown }).path === 'string' &&
883: +          typeof (item as { size?: unknown }).size === 'number'

885: +    })
886: +    .slice(0, 200);

1704: +export async function createWorkspaceOperation(
1705: +  db: D1Database,
1706: +  input: CreateWorkspaceOperationInput
1707: +): Promise<{ operation: WorkspaceOperationResponse; reused: boolean }> {
1708: +  const now = new Date().toISOString();
1709: +  const existingIdempotency = await db
1710: +    .prepare(
1711: +      `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1712: +       FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1713: +       WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1714: +       LIMIT 1`
1715: +    )
1716: +    .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1717: +    .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1718: +
1719: +  if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at > now) {
1720: +    if (existingIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1721: +      throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1722: +    }
1723: +
1724: +    const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, existingIdempotency.operation_id);
1725: +    if (!existingOperation) {
1726: +      throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${existingIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1727: +    }
1728: +    return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1729: +  }
1730: +
1731: +  if (existingIdempotency && existingIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1732: +    await db
1733: +      .prepare(
1734: +        `DELETE FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1735: +         WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?`
1736: +      )
1737: +      .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1738: +      .run();
1739: +  }
1740: +
1741: +  const expiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
1742: +  const operationId = input.id;
1743: +
1744: +  const operationRecord = await db
1745: +    .prepare(
1746: +      `INSERT INTO workspace_operations (
1747: +         id,
1748: +         workspace_id,
1749: +         type,
1750: +         status,
1751: +         actor_id,
1752: +         auth_principal_json,
1753: +         request_payload_json,
1754: +         request_payload_sha256,
1755: +         idempotency_key,
1756: +         warnings_json
1757: +       )
1758: +       VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'queued', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, '[]')
1759: +       RETURNING *`
1760: +    )
1761: +    .bind(
1762: +      operationId,
1763: +      input.workspaceId,
1764: +      input.type,
1765: +      input.actorId ?? null,
1766: +      JSON.stringify(input.authPrincipal ?? {}),
1767: +      JSON.stringify(input.requestPayload ?? {}),
1768: +      input.requestPayloadSha256,
1769: +      input.idempotencyKey
1770: +    )
1771: +    .first<WorkspaceOperationRecord>();
1772: +
1773: +  if (!operationRecord) {
1774: +    throw new Error('Failed to create workspace operation');
1775: +  }
1776: +
1777: +  try {
1778: +    await db
1779: +      .prepare(
1780: +        `INSERT INTO workspace_operation_idempotency (
1781: +           id,
1782: +           workspace_id,
1783: +           operation_type,
1784: +           idempotency_key,
1785: +           operation_id,
1786: +           request_payload_sha256,
1787: +           expires_at
1788: +         )
1789: +         VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`
1790: +      )
1791: +      .bind(
1792: +        generatePrefixedId('wopk'),
1793: +        input.workspaceId,
1794: +        input.type,
1795: +        input.idempotencyKey,
1796: +        operationId,
1797: +        input.requestPayloadSha256,
1798: +        expiresAt
1799: +      )
1800: +      .run();
1801: +  } catch (error) {
1802: +    if (!isUniqueConstraintError(error)) {
1803: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1804: +      throw error;
1805: +    }
1806: +
1807: +    const concurrentIdempotency = await db
1808: +      .prepare(
1809: +        `SELECT operation_id, request_payload_sha256, expires_at
1810: +         FROM workspace_operation_idempotency
1811: +         WHERE workspace_id = ? AND operation_type = ? AND idempotency_key = ?
1812: +         LIMIT 1`
1813: +      )
1814: +      .bind(input.workspaceId, input.type, input.idempotencyKey)
1815: +      .first<{ operation_id: string; request_payload_sha256: string; expires_at: string }>();
1816: +
1817: +    if (!concurrentIdempotency || concurrentIdempotency.expires_at <= now) {
1818: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1819: +      throw new Error('Idempotency race detected but winner record is unavailable');
1820: +    }
1821: +    if (concurrentIdempotency.request_payload_sha256 !== input.requestPayloadSha256) {
1822: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1823: +      throw new WorkspaceIdempotencyConflictError(input.idempotencyKey, input.type);
1824: +    }
1825: +
1826: +    const existingOperation = await getWorkspaceOperation(db, input.workspaceId, concurrentIdempotency.operation_id);
1827: +    if (!existingOperation) {
1828: +      await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1829: +      throw new Error(`Idempotency record references missing operation ${concurrentIdempotency.operation_id}`);
1830: +    }
1831: +    await db.prepare('DELETE FROM workspace_operations WHERE id = ?').bind(operationId).run();
1832: +    return { operation: existingOperation, reused: true };
1833: +  }
1834: +
1835: +  return { operation: toWorkspaceOperationResponse(operationRecord), reused: false };
1836: +}

1855: +export async function claimWorkspaceOperationForExecution(

1875: +export async function updateWorkspaceOperationStatus(
1876: +  db: D1Database,
1877: +  operationId: string,
1878: +  status: WorkspaceOperationStatus,
1879: +  options?: {
1880: +    result?: unknown;
1881: +    warnings?: unknown[];
1882: +    errorCode?: string | null;
1883: +    errorClass?: string | null;
1884: +    errorMessage?: string | null;
1885: +    errorDetails?: unknown;
1886: +    startedAt?: string | null;
1887: +    finishedAt?: string | null;
1888: +  }
1889: +): Promise<void> {
1890: +  const updates: string[] = ['status = ?', 'updated_at = ?'];
1891: +  const values: Array<string | number | null> = [status, new Date().toISOString()];
1892: +
1893: +  if (options?.startedAt !== undefined) {
1894: +    updates.push('started_at = ?');
1895: +    values.push(options.startedAt);
1896: +  }
1897: +  if (options?.finishedAt !== undefined) {
1898: +    updates.push('finished_at = ?');
1899: +    values.push(options.finishedAt);
1900: +  }
1901: +  if (options?.result !== undefined) {
1902: +    updates.push('result_json = ?');
1903: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.result));
1904: +  }
1905: +  if (options?.warnings !== undefined) {
1906: +    updates.push('warnings_json = ?');
1907: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.warnings));
1908: +  }
1909: +  if (options?.errorCode !== undefined) {
1910: +    updates.push('error_code = ?');
1911: +    values.push(options.errorCode);
1912: +  }
1913: +  if (options?.errorClass !== undefined) {
1914: +    updates.push('error_class = ?');
1915: +    values.push(options.errorClass);
1916: +  }
1917: +  if (options?.errorMessage !== undefined) {
1918: +    updates.push('error_message = ?');
1919: +    values.push(options.errorMessage);
1920: +  }
1921: +  if (options?.errorDetails !== undefined) {
1922: +    updates.push('error_details_json = ?');
1923: +    values.push(JSON.stringify(options.errorDetails));
1924: +  }
1925: +  if (status === 'running') {
1926: +    updates.push('started_at = COALESCE(started_at, ?)');
1927: +    values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1928: +  }
1929: +  if (status === 'succeeded' || status === 'failed') {
1930: +    updates.push('finished_at = COALESCE(?, finished_at)');
1931: +    values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1932: +    updates.push('duration_ms = CASE WHEN started_at IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST((julianday(COALESCE(?, finished_at)) - julianday(started_at)) * 86400000 AS INTEGER) END');
1933: +    values.push(new Date().toISOString());
1934: +  }
1935: +
1936: +  values.push(operationId);
1937: +
1938: +  await db
1939: +    .prepare(`UPDATE workspace_operations SET ${updates.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`)
1940: +    .bind(...values)
1941: +    .run();
1942: +}

parts.text:
I found 3 issues worth fixing before merge:

- High — GitHub token can leak via operation error messages  
  - `executeForkCommitAndPushInSandbox` builds a remote URL with the installation token inline (`packages/worker/src/api/workspaces.ts:691`), and `runSandboxCommandWithOutput` includes the full command in thrown errors (`packages/worker/src/api/workspaces.ts:145`).  
  - That raw error is persisted as `errorMessage` (`packages/worker/src/api/workspaces.ts:1277`) and then returned in operation responses, so a failed fork can expose a valid repo write token.  
  - Fix by never interpolating credentials into logged/thrown command strings; redact before persistence, or pass token via safer channel and sanitize all sandbox errors.

- Medium — “Async” operation endpoints still run work inline and can time out  
  - `handleCreateWorkspaceOperation` awaits full execution before returning `202` (`packages/worker/src/api/workspaces.ts:1317`).  
  - The execution path includes network calls + git push (up to 10 minutes), so requests can exceed worker/request limits and fail client-side despite mutating state.  
  - Fix by queueing background execution (or DO alarm/queue consumer) and returning immediately after operation creation.

- Low — `finished_at` can be overwritten on repeated terminal updates  
  - `updateWorkspaceOperationStatus` uses `finished_at = COALESCE(?, finished_at)` (`packages/worker/src/lib/db.ts:1119`), which always prefers the new timestamp.  
  - If a terminal status update is replayed, completion time and `duration_ms` drift.  
  - Fix to `COALESCE(finished_at, ?)` and compute duration from the persisted `finished_at`.
